The residence

Mirabelle

A first-floor one-bedroom residence of over 105 square metres gross with a private patio, in the stone-built village quarter of Green Coast, Palasë. Broad for its type, outdoor-facing, and steps from the central plaza, the pools and the Blue Flag beach.

Location within the resort

Mirabelle · Zona G8, Green Coast Resort

Explore the residence

Walk it, room by room

Tap any room on the plan to see its size.

Position within Green Coast

Where Mirabelle sits

Mirabelle sits in the eastern quarter of the village, among the garden courtyards away from the main spine. The central plaza is a short walk west, the parking entrance beyond it, and the paths down to the beach begin at the village edge.

Location & setting

Life at Green Coast

Green Coast is the Albanian Riviera's most established resort address — a stone-built village above the Blue Flag beach at Palasë, where the Ceraunian mountains meet the Ionian. Mediterranean architecture in local stone, travertine and timber; promenades, pools, restaurants and a beach club below; the life of the coast a few steps from the door.

Eastern quarter, among the garden courtyards
